messages.speaker: user
messages.text: /start Продолжай улучшение 24/7, пока не скажу стоп

messages.speaker: start
messages.text:
Task(subagent_type="orchestrator", prompt="OBJECTIVE: Продолжай улучшение 24/7, пока не скажу стоп
ORIGINAL_REQUEST: /start Продолжай улучшение 24/7, пока не скажу стоп
CONTINUOUS_MODE: until_user_stop
WAVE_NUMBER: 1
RESPONSE_LANGUAGE: ru
PARENT_TASK_RELAY_ALLOWED: yes
EXPECTATION: return status: pause with pause_reason: RELAY_REQUIRED and resume_packet or COMPLETION_CONTRACT")

messages.speaker: start
messages.text:
START_REPORT:
  status: pause
  pause_reason: RELAY_REQUIRED
  orchestrator_summary: relay required before execution
  net_new_evidence:
    - nested Task unavailable inside orchestrator runtime
    - zero-repo-touch contract preserved
  proxy_orchestrator_packet: |
    RELAY_MODE: root_task_proxy
    CONTINUOUS_MODE: until_user_stop
    WAVE_NUMBER: 1
    ORIGINAL_REQUEST: /start Продолжай улучшение 24/7, пока не скажу стоп
    CONTINUATION_PACKET: none
    RESPONSE_LANGUAGE: ru
    OWNERSHIP: orchestrator refines exact paths
    DEPENDENCIES: none
  resume_packet: tighten acceptance criteria after relayed wave
  recommended_action: relay_orchestrator

messages.speaker: start
messages.text:
Task(subagent_type="orchestrator", prompt="RELAY_MODE: root_task_proxy
CONTINUOUS_MODE: until_user_stop
WAVE_NUMBER: 1
